expectations.text: Uses the correct SSH command or alias to connect to srv3
expectations.evidence: Used 'ssh srv3' alias and correct IP. SSH commands visible in the output tables.

expectations.text: Runs docker service ls or equivalent to list running services
expectations.evidence: Output shows all 6 services with images and replica counts from docker service ls.

expectations.text: Reads or references deploy-test/docker-stack.yml for expected versions
expectations.evidence: Shows 'deploy-test Branch Image Versions (docker-stack.yml)' table with versions from that file.

expectations.text: Explicitly compares running vs expected image tags
expectations.evidence: Comparison table with Match? column for all 6 services. However, reported all YES when the without-skill run found a vue-members mismatch (1.0.4 running vs 1.0.3 in deploy-test). The with-skill agent read the deploy-test stack file on the server (which may have already been updated), while baseline read the local git branch.

expectations.text: Does NOT attempt to SSH into srv2 or production
expectations.evidence: All commands targeted srv3 only. No mention of srv2.
